hero.title: Travel with confidence, arrive with NUVO

hero.social_proof: Joined by over 10,000 users this month

passenger.title: Your city in your hands
passenger.subtitle: Designed so your only concern is enjoying the ride. With NUVO, smart transport is standard.

features.title: Total Simplicity
features.description: Request a ride in two taps. No complications, no unnecessary waiting.

features.title: Elite Safety

features.title: Transparent Pricing
features.description: Know the exact cost before you get in. No hidden fees or surprises.

driver.title: Drive when you want, earn what you deserve
driver.subtitle: Become a partner driver and take control of your time. NUVO offers you the best tools in the market.

cards.title: Maximized Earnings
cards.description: Real-time heat maps to position yourself where demand is highest.

cards.title: Total Flexibility
cards.description: You decide your schedule. No bosses, no constraints — just you and your road.

fleet.title: A fleet for every need
fleet.subtitle: From most affordable to most exclusive, we have the perfect vehicle waiting for you.

cards.title: NUVO Economy
cards.description: Affordable rides for everyday use. NUVO quality at the best price guaranteed.

cards.title: NUVO Premier
cards.description: Travel in style in high-end vehicles with the highest-rated drivers on our network.

cards.title: NUVO Green
cards.description: Committed to the planet. Only electric or hybrid vehicles for an eco-friendly ride.
